repair_candidate.summary: Repair PR #86913 on its contributor branch so the read-only gateway.restart.pending state change can be reconsidered after CI is green and merge preflight is complete.
repair_candidate.pr_title: fix(gateway): repair restart pending state PR checks
repair_candidate.pr_body:
## Summary
Repair the contributor branch from #86913 so the read-only `gateway.restart.pending` state change can pass required checks before maintainer merge review.

## Source and credit
This repair carries forward the work from https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/86913. Credit to @Dizesales and the original implementation commit author dizevolv425 is preserved.

## Scope
- Keep the existing gateway/admin HTTP RPC behavior narrow and read-only.
- Fix the failing type, lint, guard, build, and extension boundary checks reported in the preflight artifact.
- Avoid broad API or compatibility changes beyond making #86913 landable.

## Validation
- `pnpm check:changed`
- `pnpm exec vitest run extensions/admin-http-rpc/src/handler.test.ts src/gateway/server-methods/restart.test.ts src/infra/infra-runtime.test.ts`
- `pnpm build`

## Clownfish

Source PR: #86913
